stimulus.content: Maria sells lemonade at a stand near her school. Last week, the temperature was 95 degrees, and she sold 80 cups. This week, the temperature dropped to 55 degrees, and she only sold 20 cups.

stem: Based on this example, what happened to the demand for lemonade when the weather got cooler?
answer_explanation: When the weather got cooler, fewer people wanted to buy lemonade. This shows that demand went down. The stimulus shows sales dropped from 80 cups to 20 cups, indicating lower demand in cooler weather.
